payload.label: microwave
payload.long_description: Front view of a stainless-steel over-range microwave with a large dark glass door showing glossy reflections and slight smudging; black control panel and keypad are visible at the right but the right edge of the unit is cut off by the crop, and the unit sits directly under a wood cabinet — approx. 0.7 m from camera.

message.content: {"label":"microwave","short_description":"stainless steel microwave, edge-cropped","long_description":"Front view of a stainless-steel over-range microwave with a large dark glass door showing glossy reflections and slight smudging; black control panel and keypad are visible at the right but the right edge of the unit is cut off by the crop, and the unit sits directly under a wood cabinet — approx. 0.7 m from camera.","attributes":["stainless steel finish","dark glass door","black right-side control panel","edge-cropped/right-side cut","under-cabinet (over-range) style","reflections on glass","horizontal stainless trim","visible smudges/fingerprints"],"distance_from_camera_m":0.7}
